(NASDAQ: DDOG), the monitoring and security platform for cloud applications, today at AWS re:Invent added identity, vulnerability and app-level findings to Security Inbox. This provides engineers with one actionable view to improve security posture, without any additional overhead or friction.

title: Datadog Releases 2023 State of Cloud Security Report
text: Report finds that long-lived credentials remain a common cause for cloud security breaches  NEW YORK , Nov. 15, 2023 /PRNewswire/ --  Datadog , Inc. (NASDAQ: DDOG), the monitoring and security platform for cloud applications, today released its new report, The State of Cloud Security 2023 . Datadog analyzed security posture data from thousands of organizations using AWS, Azure or Google Cloud for the report, focusing particularly on understanding how organizations approach and mitigate common risks that frequently lead to documented public cloud security incidents.

title: Datadog stock soars as rising cloud activity drives revenue growth
text: Datadog Inc (NASDAQ:DDOG) stock advanced more than 23% as the cloud-data firm's third quarter earnings beat Wall Street expectations. Revenue came in at $547.5 million up 25% year-on-year and comfortably beating the consensus forecast of $524.7 million, whilst earnings of 45 cents per share similarly exceeded the 34 penciled in by analysts.

title: Snowflake, MongoDB shares rally sharply after Datadog earnings
text: Shares of Snowflake Inc. SNOW, -3.86%, MongoDB Inc. MDB, -3.14% and Elastic NV ESTC, -1.49% were all rallying sharply in Tuesday's premarket trading after Datadog Inc.'s DDOG, -3.04% upbeat earnings report eased fears about consumption-based software companies for the latest quarter. Snowflake shares were up more than 8%, while MongoDB shares were up about 6% and Elastic shares were ahead about 4%.

title: Datadog Stock Skyrockets 23% on Upbeat Outlook and Customer Growth
text: For the fourth quarter, Datadog expects revenue of between $564 million and $568 million, beating analysts' estimates of $544.9 million.

title: Datadog's stock rockets as earnings, forecast blow past estimates
text: Datadog Inc. shares DDOG, -3.04% were roaring 24% higher in premarket action Tuesday after the software company, which makes tools for monitoring infrastructure and application performance, showed upside with its latest quarterly results and delivered a better-than-expected forecast. The company racked up third-quarter net income of $22.6 million, or 6 cents a share, whereas it posted a net loss of $26.0 million, or 8 cents a share, in the year-earlier period.

title: Datadog Announces Third Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text: Third quarter revenue grew 25% year-over-year to $548 million Strong growth of larger customers, with about 3,130 $100k+ ARR customers, up from about 2,600 a year ago NEW YORK , Nov. 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Datadog, Inc. (NASDAQ:DDOG), the monitoring and security platform for cloud applications, today announced financial results for its third quarter ended September 30, 2023. "We were pleased with our execution in the third quarter, with 25% year-over-year revenue growth, robust new logo bookings, and a continued focus on solving our customers' DevSecOps pain points," said Olivier Pomel, co-founder and CEO of Datadog.

title: Datadog Announces 2023 Report on Real-World Container Use, Reveals Rise in Serverless Containers
text: 46% of container organizations now run serverless containers, up from 31% two years ago NEW YORK , Nov. 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Datadog , Inc. (NASDAQ: DDOG), the monitoring and security platform for cloud applications, today unveiled the findings of its fifth annual report, 10 Insights on Real-World Container Use . To understand the state of the container ecosystem, Datadog examined data from more than 2.4 billion containers run by tens of thousands of customers.
